calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth A. McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
No appearance by defendant Natalie B. Dold.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial filed March 27, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, April 28, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A., and against defendant NATALIE B. DOLD as follows:

Damages - $4,285.81.
Costs - $300.00, for a total of $4,585.81.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court for review no later than May 2, 2008.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Interrogatories And Demand For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Natalie B Dold And Her Attorneys Of Record Frank L Kucera Esq And Law Office Of Emilio N Francisco
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Citibank's motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $390 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order That Matters In Req. For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanction Against Deft Natalie B Dold And Her Attorneys Of Record Frank L. Kucera, Esq And Law Offices Of Emilio N Francisco
Off Calendar Mar-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Citibank's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $390 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2008 Set For Trial On Apr-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
